name: USS English (DD 696)
events: 3 Sep 1944 USS English arrived at Pearl Harbor.
17 Dec 1944 USS English departed from Pearl Harbor bound for Ulithi.
28 Dec 1944 USS English arrived at Ulithi.
28 Dec 1944 USS English departed from Ulithi with TF 38.
26 Jan 1945 USS English arrived back at Ulithi.
8 Feb 1945 USS English departed from Ulithi again for operations with TF 58.
4 Mar 1945 USS English arrived back at Ulithi.
14 Mar 1945 USS English departed from Ulithi again with TF 58 in support of the Okinawa operations.
1 Jun 1945 USS English arrived at San Pedro Bay, Philippines.
1 Jul 1945 USS English departed from at San Pedro Bay, Philippines when she sailed with TF 38 to operate of the Japanese mainland.
10 Sep 1945 USS English enters Tokyo Bay.
